task_description: Remove all cloud worker, R2 backup/restore, and usage worker systems from AxonRouter. Fix the machineId ESM error by replacing the broken require-based implementation with an ESM-compatible one using node:crypto + node:os. Update CHANGELOG.md documenting all removals and noting WorkerRelay as relay proxy alternative.

verification.summary: tsc --noEmit passes with 0 errors. All 998 tests pass (22 skipped, 1 test file skipped). Grep audit confirms zero stray references to removed systems. CHANGELOG.md updated with v0.6.0 entry including WorkerRelay note. Review fixes applied: removed stale route guards, orphaned query key, dead test mocks, and ESM inconsistency in tunnelConnectionRuntime.
